title: Breakaway Music Festival
description: Headlined by John Summit, Kaskade, FISHER, and Mau P. Two days of EDM and electronic music. Perfect for couples who love to dance and enjoy a festival vibe together.

title: Euro Atlanta: I Love Reggae Night
description: Reggae, Dancehall, Soca, Afrobeats with great drinks and even better vibes. Free entry makes this an easy, low-pressure date option with awesome music.

title: Best of Atlanta Comedy Showcase
description: Top local comedians in one show. Laughing Skull is an intimate venue — great for couples who share a sense of humor and want a memorable night out.

title: Jim Breuer: Find The Funny
description: SNL legend and comedy veteran Jim Breuer brings his tour to Atlanta. A solid date-night pick — big name, good energy, memorable laughs.

title: The Poko Party
description: Electrifying all-female DJ lineup serving high-energy African rhythms. Known for its vibrant, cult following atmosphere — perfect for couples who love to dance and celebrate culture.

title: ATL BachaTuesdays
location: Academy Ballroom, 800 Miami Cir NE, Atlanta
description: Weekly Bachata and Salsa social. Great for beginners and experienced dancers alike. Affordable, fun, and a natural ice-breaker — holding someone on a dance floor never hurts a date.

title: Atlanta Jazz Festival (Memorial Day Weekend)
description: Grammy-stacked lineup celebrating its 49th year. Atlanta's premier free jazz festival — ideal for a laid-back daytime date with picnic vibes and world-class music.

title: R.A.S Memorial Weekend: 100% Reggae Afrobeats Soca
description: A memorial weekend celebration dedicated to reggae, Afrobeats, and Soca. Culture, rhythm, and community in one event. Great for couples who want to dance, celebrate heritage, and have a great time.

title: Reggae Fest Massive ATL
description: Featuring Mavado, Busy Signal, Beenie Man, Spice, Elephant Man and more legends of reggae/dancehall. Major production at a world-class venue — a can't-miss for reggae fans.

title: Birthday Bash ATL: T.I., Gucci Mane, 2 Chainz & More
description: Atlanta hip-hop legends on one stage. T.I., Gucci Mane, 2 Chainz, Waka Flocka and more. The ultimate ATL rap experience — electric for couples who love hip-hop.

title: Salsa ATL's Tropical Elegance Saturday Latin Night
description: Monthly Latin dance night with Salsa and Bachata. Tropical elegance theme — great vibes, great music, and a fun excuse to get close on the dance floor.

title: ECHOES Exhibition at Kai Lin Art
description: Third exhibition of 2026 running through May 15. Free, public opening and mixer on select dates. Perfect cultured date — grab coffee, walk through, and talk about art together.

title: Castleberry Hill Second Friday Art Stroll
description: One of Atlanta's longest-running monthly art walks. Rotating gallery exhibitions, open studios, and pop-up installations. Stroll the neighborhood, discover art, grab a drink — ideal low-key date.

title: Gordon Parks: The South in Color
description: Powerful photography exhibition running through June 13. Gordon Parks' documentation of the American South — moving, beautiful, and conversation-starting. Great for art-loving couples.

title: Atlanta Creative Arts Pop-Up
description: Three-day creative arts pop-up at the Woodruff Arts Center. Art, crafts, vendors, and creative energy — a full day activity that gives plenty to explore and talk about together.
